ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democratic, authoritarian) */,
  "healthcare_system_rating" REAL /* Rating of the country's healthcare system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epidemics" (
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each epidemic entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the country related to the epidemic */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the epidemic was first detected */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the epidemic (e.g., ongoing, under control, ended) */,
  "estimated_end_transition_days" INTEGER /* Estimated number of days until the transition phase ends */,
  "estimated_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the transition phase is estimated to end */,
  "estimated_size_cases" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the epidemic in reported cases */,
  "newly_diagnosed_error_rate" REAL /* Error rate of newly diagnosed cases reported over 7 days (%) */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate of the epidemic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epidemic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the epidemic related to the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., lockdown, vaccination) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the intervention (percentage) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the intervention */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_epidemic_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemic_id") REFERENCES epidemics ("epidemic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_interventions_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., government, NGO) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the data source */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "epidemic_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the epidemic related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the full report */,
  "epidemic_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the epidemic when the report was generated */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases reported at the time of the report */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths reported at the time of the report */,
  "recovery_rate" REAL /* Recovery rate at the time of the report */,
  "intervention_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of interventions at the time of the report */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_epidemic_id FOREIGN KEY ("epidemic_id") REFERENCES epidemics ("epidemic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, health official) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User comments regarding the platform */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5 scale) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* User recommendations for improving the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
